+	row := q.db.QueryRow(ctx, getCourse, courseid)
 	var i GetCourseRow

@@ -74,12 +74,21 @@ func (q *Queries) GetCourse(ctx context.Context, courseID pgtype.UUID) (GetCours
 }
 
 const getCourses = `-- name: GetCourses :many
-SELECT course_id, title FROM courses WHERE course_id > $1 ORDER BY course_id LIMIT ($2 + 1)
+SELECT
+    course_id,
+    title
+FROM
+    courses
+WHERE
+    $1::uuid IS NULL OR course_id > $1
+ORDER BY
+    course_id
+LIMIT ($2+ 1)
 `
 
 type GetCoursesParams struct {
-	CourseID pgtype.UUID `json:"course_id"`
-	Column2  interface{} `json:"column_2"`
+	Cursor pgtype.UUID `json:"cursor"`
+	Size   int32       `json:"+size"`
 }
 
 type GetCoursesRow struct {
@@ -88,7 +97,7 @@ type GetCoursesRow struct {
 }
 
 func (q *Queries) GetCourses(ctx context.Context, arg GetCoursesParams) ([]GetCoursesRow, error) {
-	rows, err := q.db.Query(ctx, getCourses, arg.CourseID, arg.Column2)
+	rows, err := q.db.Query(ctx, getCourses, arg.Cursor, arg.Size)
 	if err != nil {
 		return nil, err
 	}

diff --git a/apps/api/main.go b/apps/api/main.go
index 9cd6e3c..05f6fa7 100644
--- a/apps/api/main.go
+++ b/apps/api/main.go
@@ -1,13 +1,31 @@
 package main
 
 import (
+	"context"
 	"encoding/json"
 	"log"
 	"net/http"
+
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
+	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses"
+	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
 )
 
 func main(){
+
+    ctx := context.Background()
+	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres")
+	if err != nil {
+		log.Fatal(err)
+	}
+
+	queries := db.New(pool)
+
+	coursesHandler := courses.NewCoursesHandlers(courses.NewCoursesService(queries))
+
 	http.HandleFunc("/hello", helloHandler)
+	http.HandleFunc("/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
+
 	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
 	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
 }
diff --git a/apps/api/queries/courses.sql b/apps/api/queries/courses.sql
index b26d10b..7d4212d 100644
--- a/apps/api/queries/courses.sql
+++ b/apps/api/queries/courses.sql
@@ -1,5 +1,14 @@
 -- name: GetCourses :many
-SELECT course_id, title FROM courses WHERE course_id > $1 ORDER BY course_id LIMIT ($2 + 1);
+SELECT
+    course_id,
+    title
+FROM
+    courses
+WHERE
+    @Cursor::uuid IS NULL OR course_id > @Cursor
+ORDER BY
+    course_id
+LIMIT @Size;
 
 -- name: GetCourse :one
 SELECT
@@ -23,4 +32,4 @@ INNER JOIN
 INNER JOIN
     categories ON categories.category_id = courses.category_id
 WHERE
-    courses.course_id = $1;
+    courses.course_id = @CourseId;

content.content:
1→package courses
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"encoding/json"
     5→	"log"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→)
     8→
     9→type CoursesHandlers struct {
    10→	courses *CoursesService
    11→}
    12→
    13→
    14→
    15→func NewCoursesHandlers(service *CoursesService) *CoursesHandlers {
    16→	return &CoursesHandlers{ courses:service }
    17→
    18→}
    19→
    20→type GetCoursesHandlerResponse struct {
    21→	Courses []CoursesItem `json:"courses"`
    22→	Cursor *string `json:"cursor"`
    23→}
    24→
    25→func (handler *CoursesHandlers)GetCoursesHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r * http.Request){
    26→	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
    27→    cursor := r.URL.Query().Get("cursor")
    28→
    29→	courses, err := handler.courses.GetCourses(r.Context(), cursor)
    30→
    31→	if (err != nil){
    32→		log.Printf("GetCourses error: %v", err)
    33→		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
    34→		json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": "InternalServerError"})
    35→		return
    36→	}
    37→
    38→	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(courses)
    39→}
    40→

file.content:
package main

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main(){

    ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}

	queries := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := courses.NewCoursesHandlers(courses.NewCoursesService(queries))

	http.HandleFunc("/hello", helloHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

func helloHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request){
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"message": "Hello, World!"})
}
